_source: nfa0 = US net IIP / nominal GDP, 2026Q1. REAL data: FRED IIPUSNETIQ (US Net International Investment Position, -21,270,237 Mil USD, ref 2026-01-01) / FRED GDP (nominal GDP SAAR, 31,865.721 Bil USD, 2026Q1) = -66.75% of GDP. US is a large net debtor.
_flags: iNFA (imputed return on NFA, ~3% p.a.) and fxShare (FX-exposed NFA share, ~0.4) are MODELING DEFAULTS shipped flagged (like the structural SFA), NOT estimated/sourced.
